backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile storage with authorization, DCF calculation functions (present value, annual PV, validation), and public APIs for profile management and DCF processing with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON structure with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files documenting the DCF calculator UI components, hooks, utilities, and build scripts with notes on removed fields (industryGrowthPercent) and styling system.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including charcoal/ivory base colors and emerald accents.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with meta tags, favicon reference, and "Intri" title; includes SEO description for DCF valuation tool.
frontend/scripts/check-required-generate: Node.js prebuild validation script that checks for required generated image assets (hero and icon) and exits with error if any are missing.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component orchestrating the DCF calculator with header, input form, company info display, results section, calculator actions, and footer with social links.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminProfi: Empty file, likely a placeholder for admin profile management functionality.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthPanel.t: Empty file, likely a placeholder for authentication panel UI.
frontend/src/components/BuyTargetPriceCa: React component displaying buy and target price cards with gradient styling, icons, and optional warning message for valuation thresholds.
frontend/src/components/CalculatorAction: Action buttons component providing example inputs, reset, shareable link copying, and development-only verification check functionality.
frontend/src/components/CapitalReturnSec: Card component displaying four capital return metrics (yearly, quarterly, average, and plus asset) in a styled grid layout.
frontend/src/components/CompanyInfoDispl: Displays company information (share name, market cap, LTP, revenue, net profit) in a card with icons; only renders if data is present.
frontend/src/components/DcfInputsForm.ts: Form component for entering DCF inputs including company snapshot, financial metrics, and growth rates with validation error display.
frontend/src/components/FormulasDialog.t: Dialog component that displays all DCF formulas grouped by category (primary, intermediate, capital return, output) with calculated values and expressions.
Card component for managing draft and live URLs with copy/open functionality and Caffeine platform integration for publishing.
frontend/src/components/profile/UserProf: Empty file, likely a placeholder for user profile form component.
frontend/src/components/ResultsSection.t: Displays calculated buy and target prices with animated count-up effects and warnings; includes a button to trigger both calculations.
frontend/src/features/dcf/calculations.t: Exports functions to calculate hidden DCF values, intrinsic price, and actual value by delegating to the formula registry in formulas.ts.
frontend/src/features/dcf/dcf.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder or deprecated DCF feature module.
frontend/src/features/dcf/devChecks.ts: Provides a development verification function that compares calculated intrinsic price and actual value against expected values with tolerance checking, logging detailed pass/fail results to the console.
frontend/src/features/dcf/formulas.ts: Defines the complete formula registry for DCF calculations including safe numeric helpers, intermediate formulas (B-Q), capital return calculations, and final outputs like intrinsic price and actual value.
frontend/src/features/dcf/presets.ts: Defines the DcfInputs interface and provides three preset configurations: DEFAULT_INPUTS (empty), EXAMPLE_INPUTS (150B market cap example), and VERIFICATION_INPUTS (100B test case).
frontend/src/features/dcf/sensitivity.ts: Empty file, likely placeholder for future sensitivity analysis functionality.
frontend/src/features/dcf/validation.ts: Provides input validation for DcfInputs, checking for negative values, percentage ranges (0-1), and whitespace-only strings, returning an array of ValidationError objects.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, handling authentication with Internet Identity and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useAllUserProfiles.ts: Empty file, likely placeholder for fetching all user profiles.
Empty file, likely placeholder for fetching the current caller's user profile.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: React hook that animates numeric transitions with a count-up effect using requestAnimationFrame and ease-out cubic easing over a configurable duration.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence in local storage, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: Empty file, likely placeholder for checking if the current caller has admin privileges.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts: Custom React hook that provides useState-like interface for persisting state in browser localStorage with JSON serialization and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides useBackendCalculation hook that maps frontend DcfInputs to backend format and queries the actor's processDcf method using React Query with 30-second stale time.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueryInputs.ts: Custom React hook that syncs DCF calculator inputs with URL query parameters, enabling shareable links with encoded company financial data (market cap, revenue, profit, etc.).
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space, featuring charcoal/ivory base colors with emerald accents and hero headline gradient utilities.
frontend/src/lib/format.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers as INR currency, large currency with abbreviations (M/B/T), percentages, and comma-separated numbers.
frontend/src/lib/number.ts: Utility functions for safely parsing numeric and percentage inputs from strings, handling empty values and converting between decimal and percentage formats.
frontend/src/lib/url.ts: URL validation and safe operations utilities including HTTP(S) URL validation, clipboard copy with error handling, and secure URL opening with pop-up blocker detection.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for parameters like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, Inter font family, container settings, custom animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking Google Analytics integration issue where the URL shows as invalid, with pending action items to verify GA4 tracking code implementation without affecting user experience.
